SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-14-2011 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: William P. Lamb, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: B. Fields, #7235

David Golden, Esq. for Plaintiffs: John and James Acquistapace, were placed under oath and direct examined.
No appearance by Defendants Carol Ka Yan Lee and Linda Ka Wai Lee.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff and against defendants for Judgment as follows:

Damages - $34,483.00
Total - $34,483.00
Cross Complaint was dismissed without prejudice by the Court.
Counsel to prepare judgement and submit to Dept. 514 for signature.

4:00 P.M.
Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
